title: Appliances, Functions, Storage, and Cloud Connectivity · Protocol Clinic: Net Nfv Vpc Controls
summary: Design service paths across physical and virtual devices, private cloud networks, public services, and storage. Planned artifact: Add and verify the net nfv vpc controls increment in a labeled hybrid-service path. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Explain NFV, VPC boundaries, security groups, security lists, subnets, route tables, and virtual gateways.
Explain CDN, VPN, QoS, and TTL functions and how each changes delivery, privacy, priority, or loop lifetime.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

# comptia-network-plus safe operations evidence notebook
